skills.name: Lumière Sonnet
skills.description: Walks out on a red carpet to welcome allies. Restores all allies' HP and removes 2 debuffs from them, then increases all allies' (excluding self) Action Gauge by 15%. Grants self 1 stack of Insight. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.

levels.description: Increases Asherah's Max HP by 5%.

Increases Asherah's Max HP by 5%. Asherah restores the HP of the ally with the current lowest HP ratio after using Belle Lame. Increases self Dual Attack Chance by 10% for each stack of Insight on self, up to 5 stacks. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.
